ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Continued To Nov-26-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Allan Samson, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: United Natural Foods West Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Judy Johnson, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: California Harvest Healthy Foods Ranch Market, Inc. and Gilles Desaulniers as follows:
Damages $43,120.10
Prejudgment Interest $9,227.70
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $465.00, for a total of $55,637.80
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Sept. 24, 2007
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-24-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
